accepted.reason: Array-shape checks and center-crop transforms over 3D image stacks are useful numeric preprocessing kernels.
Mandelbrot escape iteration is a classic nested-loop compute kernel with clear optimization value.
Index mapping between label lists is a compact but common data-transformation kernel.
Binary frame parsing with masking and variable-length payload handling is a practical performance-sensitive loop workload.
Byte-buffer cursor management and resize/read/write logic provide systems-style optimization examples.
Prime sieve elimination loops remain a strong algorithmic optimization target despite notebook-checkpoint origin.
Grid remap and flux-sifting updates are numerically relevant kernel-style array operations.

skipped.reason: Resource-finalizer wrapper for UCX handles; lifecycle plumbing rather than optimization kernel.
Large class-based algorithm framework with heavy external coupling; not a clean standalone kernel extract in this pass.
Feature parsing/object model is domain-specific record plumbing with limited generic kernel value.
